claim_under_attack: A scaled-back Total Access (~$150M/year with capped exchanges) preserves the hybrid value proposition while freeing $200M+ annually for streaming investment.
evidence_or_reason: The visible record supports neither the ~$150M residual burn estimate nor the assumption that capping exchanges at 3-5 per month preserves enough subscriber value to avoid major churn. The artifact itself admits subscriber elasticity is unknown and calls for testing before rollout. That makes the claimed synthesis speculative: it presents an unvalidated operating model as if the economics and retention tradeoff were already established.
